user.title: Multi-Zone Mini-Split Thermostat
user.description: Set up a virtual thermostat that manages multiple mini-split zones.

preset_config.title: Configure Preset Temperatures
preset_config.description: Set heating and cooling target temperatures for each preset. These temperatures are shared across all zones in the group.

add_zone.title: Add Climate Zone
add_zone.description: Add a climate zone to this thermostat group.

data.priority: Zone Priority (higher = more important for mode decisions)

add_zone_confirm.title: Add Another Zone?
add_zone_confirm.description: Would you like to add another climate zone to this group?

remove_zone.title: Remove Zone
remove_zone.description: Select a zone to remove from the thermostat group.

manage_zones.title: Manage Zones
manage_zones.description: Manage the zones in this thermostat group. Current zones: {zone_count}

error.already_added: This entity is already added to the zones list

add_zone.title: Add Climate Zone
add_zone.description: Add a climate zone to this thermostat group.

data.priority: Zone Priority (higher = more important for mode decisions)

remove_zone.title: Remove Zone
remove_zone.description: Select a zone to remove from this thermostat group.

error.already_added: This zone is already added to the thermostat group.

set_zone_preset.name: Set Zone Preset
set_zone_preset.description: Set the preset for a specific zone.

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: The climate entity ID of the zone to set the preset for.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: The preset to apply (comfort, eco, or failsafe).
